headlines.title: EU to hold migration meeting with Taliban officials in Brussels
headlines.snippet: The EU will hold a migration meeting in Brussels with Taliban officials. The primary focus of this meeting is expected to be the deportation of Afghan nationals who do not have the legal right to remain in Europe.

headlines.title: Why Iran’s President Pezeshkian is heading to Pakistan after US talks
headlines.snippet: Iranian President Pezeshkian is undertaking his first overseas trip since the Iran war began, traveling to Pakistan shortly after high-stakes talks held in Switzerland.

headlines.title: Video: Pro-Israel group chief boasts about targeting Francesca Albanese

headlines.title: Morning update

headlines.title: Iranian president says effectiveness of talks depends on commitment to obligations
headlines.snippet: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian stated that the effectiveness of negotiations with Washington hinges on the full and precise implementation of agreed-upon obligations. He emphasized that practical adherence to responsibilities, not external statements, will advance the talks.

headlines.title: Channel 13 reports curbs on Israeli army movements in Lebanon

headlines.title: Former Labour leader revives bill on 'Britain's complicity in genocide'
